build.buildCommand: npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run build 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build

deploy.startCommand: cd lib/db && (pnpm run push-force || true) && cd ../../ && node --enable-source-maps ./artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs
